schemas.FULL_NAME_DESCRIPTION: Full legal name and surname according to the civil registry or federated identity provider.
schemas.EMAIL_DESCRIPTION: Primary electronic mail address linked to the sovereign account and official communications.
schemas.AVATAR_DESCRIPTION: URL address of the profile image retrieved from the verified social identity provider.
schemas.TRUST_LEVEL_DESCRIPTION: Bayesian algorithmic coefficient that determines the weight of citizen actions and votes on the network.

errors.INVALID_AVATAR_URL: The profile photograph address violates network security and integrity standards.
errors.TRUST_LEVEL_OUT_OF_BOUNDS: The trust level must be strictly between 0.0 and 1.0.
errors.IDENTITY_NOT_FOUND: No citizen identity was identified with the provided search criteria.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED_PROVIDER: The requested social identity provider is not trusted by the NGO.
